marked reduction in bladder capacity (150 cc)

deranged liver function tests (bilirubin 7 μmol/l, ALP 1503 IU/l, ALT 482 IU/l, γGT 561 IU/l)
no strictures or stones in CBD
liver function tests partially improved (bilirubin 21 μmol/l, ALP 770 IU/l, ALT 326 IU/l, γGT 1554 IU/l)
serum creatinine risen to 309 μmol/l (eGFR 21 ml/min)
